rows.label: qev041004_MSG0001
rows.name:
Whoa there, easy...
This Nopohippo got completely attached to us, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0002
rows.name:
Guess feeding it before we attacked that guy
really paid off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0003
rows.name: Now, let's get right to checking our treasure...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heheh... It's the thing that Zazazan
was treating with special care...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0005
rows.name:
Boys! If this goes well,
we can live in luxury without taking a single mission for a while![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_SEL0021
rows.name: Wait and see what happens for a bit.

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0006
rows.name:
You're Zazazan's...!
Did that bastard hire you this time
to come and take back this treasure?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0007
rows.name:
Something that stingy bastard Zazazan is so obsessed with...
What the hell is this thing?
Jewels? Precious weapons? Or maybe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well, whatever it is, I'm looking forward to it!
We'll take care of you, then
take our sweet time checking it out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hey! Let's go, boys!
Make 'em realize the terror of the Harvey squad![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Wait, this thing...!
It's got a damn lock on it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0012
rows.name:
Dammit! Ain't there a big rock rollin' around
somewhere I can use to smash it open...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0013
rows.name:
Wha! You're Zazazan's...!
Did that bastard hire you this time
to come and take back this treasure?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0014
rows.name:
Something that stingy bastard Zazazan is so obsessed with...
What the hell is this thing?
Jewels? Precious weapons? Or maybe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0015
rows.name:
Heheh, whatever it is, I'm looking forward to it!
We'll take care of you, then
take our sweet time checking it out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041004_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hey! Let's go, boys!
Make 'em realize the terror of the Harvey squad![ST:wait ]
